mapper.select:
SELECT c.CourseID, c.course_no, c.CourseName, c.Credits, c.DayOfWeek, c.TimePeriod FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.TeacherID = t.TeacherID WHERE 1=1
AND c.course_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{courseNo}, '%')
AND c.courseName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{courseName}, '%')
AND c.Credits = #{credit}
AND c.DayOfWeek LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dayOfWeek}, '%')
AND c.TimePeriod LIKE CONCAT('%', #{timeSlot}, '%')
AND t.teacher_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{teacherName}, '%')
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course c WHERE 1=1
AND c.course_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{courseNo}, '%')
AND c.courseName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{courseName}, '%')
AND c.Credits = #{credit}
AND c.DayOfWeek LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dayOfWeek}, '%')
AND c.TimePeriodLIKE CONCAT('%', #{timeSlot}, '%')
